heading: Suspension of taxes and credits until related income taken into account
label: 909 Suspension of taxes and credits until related income taken into account
notes: Amendments2017—Subsec. children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If there is a foreign tax credit splitting event with respect to a foreign income tax paid or accrued by the taxpayer, such tax shall not be taken into account for purposes of this title before the taxable year in which the related income is taken into account under this chapter by the taxpayer.

children.heading: Special rules with respect to specified 10-percent owned foreign corporations
children.label: b Special rules with respect to specified 10-percent owned foreign corporations

children.text: for purposes of determining earnings and profits under section 964(a),

children.heading: Treatment of foreign taxes after suspension
children.label: 2 Treatment of foreign taxes after suspension
children.text: In the case of any foreign income tax not taken into account by reason of subsection (a) or (b), except as otherwise provided by the Secretary, such tax shall be so taken into account in the taxable year referred to in such subsection (other than for purposes of section 986(a)) as a foreign income tax paid or accrued in such taxable year.

children.heading: Foreign tax credit splitting event
children.label: 1 Foreign tax credit splitting event
children.text: There is a foreign tax credit splitting event with respect to a foreign income tax if the related income is (or will be) taken into account under this chapter by a covered person.

children.heading: Foreign income tax
children.label: 2 Foreign income tax
children.text: The term “foreign income tax” means any income, war profits, or excess profits tax paid or accrued to any foreign country or to any possession of the United States.

children.heading: Related income
children.label: 3 Related income
children.text: The term “related income” means, with respect to any portion of any foreign income tax, the income (or, as appropriate, earnings and profits) to which such portion of foreign income tax relates.

children.label: A
children.text: any entity in which the payor holds, directly or indirectly, at least a 10 percent ownership interest (determined by vote or value),

children.label: B
children.text: any person which holds, directly or indirectly, at least a 10 percent ownership interest (determined by vote or value) in the payor,

children.label: C
children.text: any person which bears a relationship to the payor described in section 267(b) or 707(b), and

children.label: D
children.text: any other person specified by the Secretary for purposes of this paragraph.
appropriate exceptions from the provisions of this section, and
for the proper application of this section with respect to hybrid instruments.
